secretHandling: Provide references and approvals through owner-approved secure channels. Never place private keys, seed phrases, PEM contents, validator keys or full provider credentials in chat or git.

requests.minimum: Approved owner and target commit or pull request for the supplied Wallet registry, challenge/completion/revocation routes, Product Session proof introspection and authoritative Resource route map
Approved HTTPS staging and public origins, canonical /resource-market route, DNS owner and remote health/version endpoints

At least two approved independent Testnet provider identities/endpoints, workload credentials by secret-manager reference, bounded settlement signer path and funded public test account approval; no secret material
Owner-controlled Android/iOS signing workflows, Apple build host or CI, store accounts and signing/recovery ceremony references
Approved jurisdiction, privacy/security/support/status HTTPS URLs and accountable professional reviewers for all 12 locale catalogs
Approved immutable artifact host and publication owner for source-bound hashes, bytes, signing class and installation instructions
